steps.title: Sort 2012 data and find the median (5th value)
steps.content:
With 9 countries, the median is the 5th value when sorted. Reading the 2012 column: 83.0, 66.7, 57.5, 57.7, 46.4, 35.7, 30.4, 26.3, 24.7.
Sorting in ascending order: 24.7, 26.3, 30.4, 35.7, 46.4, 57.5, 57.7, 66.7, 83.0
The median for 2012 is 46.4 million.

steps.title: Sort 2013 data and find the difference
steps.content:
Reading the 2013 column: 84.7, 69.8, 60.7, 55.7, 47.7, 37.8, 31.5, 32.2, 28.4.
Sorting in ascending order: 28.4, 31.5, 32.2, 37.8, 47.7, 55.7, 60.7, 69.8, 84.7
The median for 2013 is 47.7 million.

The difference is: $$47.7-46.4=1.3$$ million. Desmos can compute the same median difference directly from the two lists. The answer is 1.3,13/10.
